lede: A look at April 12 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Jan Bednarek and Blerim Džemaili, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Tisza Party
events.desc: The Tisza Party, led by Péter Magyar wins the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election, defeating Viktor Orbán's Fidesz party, which had ruled the country for 16 years, marking the first change in government in Hungary for over a decade.

events.title: Great Fire of Valparaíso
events.desc: The Great Fire of Valparaíso ravages the Chilean city of Valparaíso, killing 16 people, displacing nearly 10,000, and destroying more than 2,500 homes.

events.title: April 2013 Kidal attack
events.desc: Two suicide bombers kill three Chadian soldiers and injure dozens of civilians at a market in Kidal, Mali.

events.title: Harold Washington
events.desc: Harold Washington is elected as the first black mayor of Chicago.

events.title: Terry Fox
events.desc: Canadian runner and athlete, Terry Fox begins his Marathon of Hope Run in St. John's, NF

events.title: SMS Zrínyi
events.desc: SMS Zrínyi, one of the last pre-dreadnought battleships built by the Austro-Hungarian Navy, is launched.

events.title: Broughton Suspension Bridge
events.desc: Soldiers marching on the Broughton Suspension Bridge in Manchester, England, cause it to collapse.

events.title: Froberg mutiny
events.desc: The Froberg mutiny on Malta ends when the remaining mutineers blow up the magazine of Fort Ricasoli.

events.title: American Revolution
events.desc: American Revolution: With the Halifax Resolves, the North Carolina Provincial Congress authorizes its Congressional delegation to vote for independence from Britain.

events.title: Edwin of Northumbria
events.desc: King Edwin of Northumbria is converted to Christianity by Paulinus, Bishop of York.

births.name: John Landy
births.line: Australian runner and politician, 26th Governor of Victoria (died 2022)

births.name: Hamengkubuwono IX
births.line: Indonesian politician, 2nd Vice President of Indonesia (died 1988)

deaths.text: Asha Bhosle, Indian playback singer, businesswoman, actress and television personality
Patrick Hillery, Irish physician and politician, 6th President of Ireland
Jørgen Juve, Norwegian football player and journalist
Abdülhak Hâmid Tarhan, Turkish playwright and poet

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Angelo Carletti di Chivasso
Christian feast day: Teresa of the Andes
